<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk001.pdf#page=22 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p42 -->

<!-- header: BERGLERN -->

<!-- header: BERGLERN -->


[[File:Band07_chunk001_p022_img001.jpg|thumb|C Gefangennahme Jesu/Petrus und Malchus]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p022_img002.jpg|thumb|A Verklärung Jesu]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p022_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p022_img004.jpg|thumb|D Kreuzigung Peti]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p43 -->
